home.lede: Omufuzi w’okuzuula & okukakasa ku mutimbagano gwa Vortex omukutu gwa bannaabwe.
home.fingerprintDesc: Pin ekisumuluzo kino eky'olukale mu kasitoma wo Vortex. Buli kuddamu okuva eri controller kuteekebwako omukono — obutakwatagana kitegeeza nti waliwo akyusakyusa.
home.step2: Londa §Global engeri y'omukutu mu mugezi w'okuteekawo.
home.step3: Teeka URL y'omufuzi (egonjoolwa mu ngeri ey'okwekolako ng'oyita mu SNS) oba URL y'okuyingira okuva ku mukutu guno.
home.step4: Kakasa nti pubkey mu app yo ekwatagana n’engalo waggulu.
home.step5: Olina akakwate. Ebirala byonna (olukalala lwa node, emikono) bikwatibwa mu ngeri ya otomatiki.
home.nodesDesc: Bannaffe bonna abawandiisiddwa, obuzito bwabwe, enkomerero zaabwe, n’ensonda z’okukakasa.
home.entriesDesc: URL za Bootstrap eri bakasitoma abasooka — Cloudflare emikutu, Tor, IPFS, obutereevu.
home.mirrorsDesc: Abakyaza abalala abaweereza kino kye kimu ekiriko omukono mu mbeera y'okusengejja.
home.securityDesc: Okumenya mu bujjuvu ebikakasiddwa mu ngeri ya cryptographically, ebitakakasiddwa, ne lwaki.

nodes.title: Nodes eziwandiisiddwa
nodes.lede: Buli munne omufuzi amanyi. Bakasitoma basoma olukalala luno, bakakasa omukono, era ne balondawo node gye banayungako okusinziira ku buzito. Node empya essiddwako ssimu efuna obuzito 1.0; stale oba unsealed nodes decay toward 0 kale traffic ekulukuta okubeera abalamu, bannaabwe abeesigika bokka.
nodes.legendDualD: Ewandiisiddwa ne controller ERA essiddwa ku lujegere okuyita mu Solana. Abajulizi babiri abetongodde bakakasa code hash.
nodes.legendCtrlD: Ewandiisiddwa mu mufuzi wa HTTP. Omukono gukakasa nti node erina ekisumuluzo kyayo eky'ekyama, naye obulungi bwa koodi tebunywezeddwa ku lujegere.
nodes.legendUnverifD: Emanyiddwa okuva mu fayiro ya config oba olugambo. Tekinnaba kukakasibwa. Kuba n’obwegendereza — omuntu yenna asobola okulanga pubkey okutuusa ng’obukakafu butuuse.

entries.title: URL z'okuyingiza
entries.lede: Entandikwa eri kasitoma atalina banne n’okutuusa kati. Buli URL y’okuyingira ngeri ya kutuuka ku mufuzi — okuyita mu tunnel ya Cloudflare, Tor, omulyango gwa IPFS, oba domain obutereevu. Koppa emu yonna mu Vortex app yo ku kusooka okutongozebwa.
entries.typeTunnelD: Endagiriro ya *.trycloudflare.com ey'obwereere. Tekyetaagisa akawunti. URL ekyuka nga tunnel eddamu okutandika — twala nga ephemeral.
entries.typeTorD: .endagiriro y’obutungulu, etuukirirwa okuyita mu Tor yokka. Censor-proof, egenda mpola. Yeetaaga kasitoma oba omutala gwa Tor.
entries.typeIpfsD: Kopi eriko endagiriro y'ebirimu eya static frontend. Eweebwa okuva ku mulyango gwonna ogwa IPFS — tewali seva emu okuziyiza.
entries.typeDirectD: Domain eya bulijjo + TLS. Esinga okusimbula naye nga ezibikira ku ddaala lya DNS/IP.

mirrors.title: Ebifo eby’endabirwamu
mirrors.lede: Ebifo ebirala ebiweereza ebirimu ebiteekeddwako emikono bye bimu ddala n’omukutu guno. Omugaso singa vortexx.sol ezibiddwa ku DNS/ISP yo. Buli ndabirwamu ekeberebwa buli luvannyuma lwa kiseera — akabonero ka langi kalaga ekivudde mu kunoonyereza okusembayo.
mirrors.healthyD: Yanoonyereza mu ddakiika 5 ezisembyeyo era n’addamu OK. Safe okukozesa mu kiseera kino. Latency eragiddwa ku kaadi.
mirrors.unreachableD: Okunoonyereza okusembayo kulemereddwa — okuyungibwa kugaanyi, ekiseera kiwedde, 5xx. Endabirwamu eyinza okuba wansi, ng’ezibiddwa oba ng’etikkiddwa nnyo. Gezaako ekiddako.
mirrors.noprobeD: Tor .obutungulu mirrors tesobola kukeberebwa bulamu nga tolina mubaka wa Tor ow’omu kitundu. Embeera temanyiddwa — kozesa Tor browser okugezesa.

security.title: Omuze gw’ebyokwerinda
security.lede: Ddala kiki ekikakasibwa mu ngeri ya cryptographic, kiki ekitali, n’engeri buli kisumuluzo mu nkola gye kifuna — oba okufiirwa — obwesige bwo. Kino soma nga tonnayunga bakasitoma bapya ku controller gy’otoddukanya ggwe kennyini.
security.treasurySub: Wallet ya Solana efuna ssente za protocol (ebisale by’okuwandiisa okuva mu nodes empya + okusalako ebitundu 20% ku buwandiike bwa premium) n’egaba ebisigadde ng’empeera eri abaddukanya emirimu. Omuntu yenna asobola okubala ebiyingira/ebifuluma ku lujegere.
security.treasury1: Obwerufu ku lujegere — endagiriro waggulu ye nnannyini §vortexx.sol ku Solana Empeereza y’amannya. Buli kuyingira (ebisale by’okuwandiisa, okuwandiika) ne buli mpeera esasulwa eba nkolagana eriko omukono Solana — ekakasibwa omuntu yenna, nga ggwe mw’otwalidde.
security.treasury2: Fee split — 70% ku buli premium subscription egenda mu rewards pool (distributed pro-rata to nodes by usage + stake), 20% ensimbi enkulaakulana enkulu, 10% eyokebwa / ekuumibwa nga yinsuwa. Okuwandiisa ebisale anchor node identity ne anti-sybil.
security.treasury3: Okulabula ku by’okulabirira — okutuusa ng’endagaano y’okusasula entegefu essiddwa mu nkola, eggwanika kikola ng’omukuumi ow’ekiseera. Kino kiwandiikiddwa mu bwesimbu wano era ne kirondoolebwa mu lujjudde. Endagaano eno entegefu egenda kudda mu kifo ky’okulabirira mu ngalo nga audit + on-chain governance lands.
